title: EFA letter about academy trusts’ audited financial statements
body: "On 13 September 2013 Simon Parkes, Chief Financial Officer of the Education Funding Agency, wrote to academy finance directors and school business managers outlining key points about 2012 to 2013 audited financial statements and auditor management letters, including a note on academy trusts’ responsibilities with regard to fraud and irregularity. "

taxons.title: Academy and academy trust finance and reporting
